title: capsella altissima
intro: Capsella altissima, also known as shepherds' cabbage or tall shepherd's cress, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family, closely related to cabbage and mustard. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Capsella altissima are thought to include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Capsella altissima typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
